name: deep-loop-workflows
description: Unified deep-loop workflow parent hub: the single advisor-routable home for active deep-loop personas, routing to seven modes across four workflow families over the shared deep-loop-runtime backend. research (outward web+code iterative investigation → research/ artifacts), review (iterative code audit → P0/P1/P2 findings + verdict), ai-council (multi-seat planning deliberation → ai-council/ artifacts), and four improvement lanes on the deep-improvement packet (agent-improvement, model-benchmark, skill-benchmark, ai-system-improvement). The hub holds no per-mode convergence, state, or synthesis logic; each mode keeps its own contract in its packet and is reachable via its /deep:* command and native agent.
trigger_examples: run a deep research loop on this topic
iteratively investigate X across web and code until convergence
deep review this branch for release readiness
iterative code audit with P0/P1/P2 findings
convene the AI council to plan this
improve and score this agent, then promote or rollback
benchmark this model across prompt frameworks
benchmark how well this skill is routed
refine a non-dev AI system package
